name: Drop Mahjong tiles
short_description: A fusion of drop-style gameplay with Mahjong. Enjoyable for Mahjong enthusiasts and newcomers alike, offering a novel gaming experience even to those unfamiliar with Mahjong rules.
detailed_description:
A fusion of drop-style gameplay with Mahjong!

"Drop Mahjong Tiles" is a Mahjong puzzle game with falling game elements. The actual Mahjong scores directly become your score. Not only Mahjong enthusiasts but also those who are not familiar with Mahjong rules and hands can enjoy it intuitively.

The Mahjong tiles that fall are completely random, and like actual Mahjong, there are only up to four of the same tile. It's not a competitive format, and there's no time limit, so you can take your time and enjoy at your own pace.

The game is over when the screen is filled with tiles. Aim for a high score by clearing the Mahjong tiles!

Video Distribution Guidelines

Permission: Both individuals and corporations are permitted to distribute videos without the need for authorization.
Monetization: Monetization is allowed only through the use of functionalities provided by the video distribution platforms.
Video and Stream Titles: We appreciate it if you could include the name of the game in the title of your videos and streams, and if possible, include a link to the Steam page in the description or overview section.
Furthermore, we will not be liable for any damages resulting from the distribution of videos of this game. The contents of this guideline are subject to change without notice.
